text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 310 

SPECIALTY_TIER 

LABEL: Specialty Tier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the formulary tier is designated as a specialty tier. The specialty tier 
contains high-cost products which must meet a certain monthly dollar threshold as set by CMS, and 
products on this tier are typically limited to a percentage coinsurance of 25% and cannot exceed 33%. 

TYPE:
